records.name: Insignia Explosion
records.description: Select a target within 20m to deal - damage to up to 4 enemies within 4m and inflict Stun for 3s. Stun chance is doubled on NPC targets. Damage and Stun chance increases based on Insignia stacks. 1 stack: - damage, 10% Stun chance 2 stacks: - damage, 20% Stun chance 3 stacks: - damage, 30% Stun chance 4 stacks: - damage, 40% Stun chance 5 stacks: - damage, 50% Stun chance 7 Stagger Gauge Damage
records.descriptionFr: Select une cible à moins de 20 m à deal damage à jusqu’à 4 ennemis à moins de 4 m et inflige étourdissement pendant 3 s. Les chances d’étourdissement sont doublées contre les cibles PNJ. Les dégâts et les chances d’étourdissement augmentent selon le nombre de charges Insignia. 1 charge: damage, 10% étourdissement chance 2 charges: damage, 20% étourdissement chance 3 charges: damage, 30% étourdissement chance 4 charges: damage, 40% étourdissement chance 5 charges: damage, 50% étourdissement chance 7 dégâts à la jauge de déséquilibre

records.name: Assault Ambush
records.description: Select a target within 20m and deal - damage to up to 4 enemies within 4m of the target with a 30% chance to inflict Blind for 5s. 100% chance to inflict Blind on NPC targets. Increases Defense by up to 20% proportional to hit targets.

Increases défense de up à 20% proportional à hit cibles.

records.name: Revitalization Contract
records.description: Increases the caster's Status Effect Resist by 16.5% . Increases Status Effect Resist by 10% for 5s when hit while afflicted with Stun, Knockdown, Airborne, Frost, or Fear (up to 10 stacks). Immediately restores 35% Max HP when HP is 10% or less. Healing Cooldown: 60s Status Effect Resist Increase Cooldown: 1s
